topology_op_labels: Pump A — Nucleophilic amine feed, kept separate from acid chloride until mixing point
Pump B — Electrophilic acyl chloride feed, moisture-sensitive, kept separate
Pump C — Inline base to scavenge HCl byproduct generated during aminolysis; prevents acid degradation of product and corrosion
MFC D — Hydrogen gas introduced only at Stage 2 inlet via mass flow controller for controlled gas-liquid segmented flow into Pd/C packed bed
Packed Bed — Gas-liquid catalytic hydrogenation of alkene intermediate
MFC E — Compressed air introduced only at Stage 3 via second mass flow controller; O2 is the terminal oxidant for photoredox cycle. Must not contact upstream H2 zone.
